ac_repair.name: AC Repairs
ac_repair.description: Fast and effective AC repairs for refrigerant leaks, frozen evaporator coils, electrical malfunctions, and faulty thermostats. Same-day repairs prioritized.

before_calling: Check thermostat settings (set to cool, temp below room temp)
Check breaker box for tripped circuits
Inspect and replace dirty air filter

ac_installation.name: AC Installation & Replacement
ac_installation.description: Installation of top AC brands and high-efficiency units to lower utility bills. Includes pre-installation energy audit and ductwork assessment.

ac_maintenance.name: AC Maintenance & Tune-ups
ac_maintenance.description: Regular maintenance to inspect components, check refrigerant, clean coils, and extend system life.
ac_maintenance.frequency: Once yearly (spring), twice yearly recommended in Florida due to heavy usage

air_quality.name: Indoor Air Quality Assessment
air_quality.description: Comprehensive assessments for pollutants, humidity, and ventilation with solutions like UV-light and advanced filtration.

installation.name: Heating Installation
installation.description: Installation of furnaces, heat pumps, ductless mini-splits, and hybrid systems tailored to home heating needs.

repair.name: Electrical Repair
repair.description: Professional diagnosis and repair by licensed electricians for dead outlets, flickering lights, strange smells, or buzzing sounds.

installation.name: Electrical Installation
installation.description: Wiring and installation for ceiling fans, kitchen appliances, lighting fixtures, and more.

surge_protection.name: Whole-Home Surge Protection
surge_protection.description: Professional surge protectors installed at main electrical panel to shield electronics from voltage spikes.

generators.name: Home Generator Installation
generators.description: Expert installation of whole-home or partial standby generators that automatically restore power during outages.
generators.warning: Self-installation strongly discouraged for permanent standby units. Only portable units should be DIY.
generators.maintenance: Every 6-12 months or after 100 hours runtime

repair.name: Plumbing Repair
repair.description: Comprehensive repair for dripping faucets, burst pipes, running toilets with expertise in copper, PVC, and PEX.

water_heater.name: Water Heater Services
water_heater.description: Installation, repair, and maintenance for traditional, tankless, and on-demand water heaters.
water_heater.repair_vs_replace: Often worth repairing if relatively new. Professional assessment recommended.

leak_detection.name: Leak Detection Services
leak_detection.description: Identification and repair of hidden leaks in walls, ceilings, floors, and slabs using specialized equipment.

repiping.name: Whole Home Repiping
repiping.description: Replacing outdated, corroded, or leaking pipes with modern PEX or CPVC materials.

clearing.name: Drain Clearing & Cleaning
clearing.description: Removing blockages using professional rooter machines and hydro-jetting for stubborn clogs.
clearing.warning: NEVER use Drano - it's corrosive and damages pipes
prevention: Don't put food, oils, fats down drains

sewer.name: Sewer Line Repair & Replacement
sewer.description: Diagnosis and repair of broken or leaking sewer pipes with trenchless options available.

maintenance_plan.name: Family Plan
maintenance_plan.description: Subscription service with priority scheduling, regular tune-ups, and repair discounts.

faqs.question: What should I check before calling for AC repair?
faqs.answer: Check thermostat settings (set to cool, temp below room temp), check breaker box for tripped circuits, and inspect/replace your air filter. These simple fixes often resolve issues.

faqs.question: How often should I schedule AC maintenance?
faqs.answer: Once yearly in spring is recommended. In Florida, twice yearly is better due to heavy usage and humidity.

faqs.question: What are signs I need AC repair?
faqs.answer: Poor airflow, water leaks, frequent short-cycling, strange odors, and odd noises like rattling, screeching, or clanging.

faqs.question: Should I repair or replace my water heater?
faqs.answer: Often worth repairing if relatively new, especially for isolated issues like sediment buildup or faulty valves. A professional assessment determines the best course.

faqs.question: How can I prevent drain clogs?
faqs.answer: Avoid putting food, oils, fats, hygiene products (even 'flushable'), and hair down drains. Use strainers in all drains.

faqs.question: Can I use Drano for clogs?
faqs.answer: No. Drano is corrosive and damages pipes and fixtures. Professional drain clearing is safer and more effective.

faqs.question: Can I install a generator myself?
faqs.answer: Self-installation is strongly discouraged for permanent standby generators due to safety and code compliance. Only portable units should be DIY. Licensed electricians should handle permanent installs.

faqs.question: How often should I service my generator?
faqs.answer: Every 6-12 months or after 100 hours of runtime.

faqs.question: Is annual HVAC maintenance necessary?
faqs.answer: Yes. It keeps systems efficient, catches minor issues before major repairs, and extends system lifespan.

faqs.question: Are your electricians licensed?
faqs.answer: Yes, all electricians are licensed and certified to perform inspections, repairs, and installations safely.

safety_escalations: major flooding - turn off main water if safe
no heat with freezing temps - immediate service needed
sewage backup - health hazard, immediate service
